name: It Takes One Year To Beat This Game
short_description: Make one billion clicks and spend years to beat the game or show who is a really pro gamer here
detailed_description:
It Takes One Year To Beat This Game is a simple clicker game with just only one objective. Your goal is to reach one billion points. Sounds easy? Yes, but not if each click gives you only one point!

It takes 30 years to reach the final goal if you click once per second. It takes one year if you click faster.

Click multiple times to activate income bonus. You can stack these power ups infinitely as long as you keep clicking.

Unlock several checkpoints to upgrade your click bonuses and get other benefits.

Features:
  • Just clicking and nothing more
  • Crazy unreachable goal if you are noob
  • Crazy but reachable goal if you are experienced player
  • Only one achievement
  • Infinite fun

And yes, not all your progress is saved when you exit the game. Good luck!

P.S. Wishlist now and within a month you will be incredibly lucky in life!
